_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to speak in front of a small audience, using our voice well to make our message clear and interesting.

_source.w: We are learning to speak in front of a small audience, using our voice well to make our message clear and interesting.
y: Presenting to others helps us share our ideas with confidence.
Learning to use our voice effectively is a skill we will use throughout our lives.
Practising now makes speaking in front of groups less scary.
eg: We share a short presentation about a favourite hobby or object with our class.
We practise changing our volume — loud enough for everyone, but not shouting.
We use expression to make interesting parts sound exciting.
We slow down our speech to make sure every word is clear.
We pause between ideas to give listeners time to follow along.
We present a retelling of a story, using different voices for different characters.
